text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"11","subject":"flt-it8.30: Quality gate reliability","description":"P1 task. Separate unit vs capability-dependent integration checks, make go test ./... reliable by default, add substantive coverage for upload validation, auth flows, worker security boundaries.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-11T02:39:21.961Z"}

You are working on beads issue flt-it8.30: "Quality gate reliability" (P1 task).

## Issue Details
Current checks rely on capabilities such as loopback listeners and Docker access without reliably skipping or isolating those cases, and several high-risk paths are covered only by placeholder tests. Separate unit vs capability-dependent integration checks, make go test ./... reliable by default, and add substantive coverage for upload validation, auth flows, and worker security boundaries.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/quality-gates"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Instructions
1. Read CLAUDE.md and api/CLAUDE.md for conventions and test tier definitions
2. Run `make api-test-unit` and `go test ./...` in the api/ directory to identify current failures
3. Fix test reliability:
   - Add `testing.Short()` guards to tests that need network/Docker/DB
   - Ensure `go test ./... -short` passes cleanly with zero failures
   - Replace placeholder/skeleton tests with substantive assertions
4. Focus coverage on:
   - Upload validation (content sniffing was just added)
   - Auth flows (JWT validation, middleware)
   - Worker security boundaries (key ownership, SSRF checks)
5. Update Makefile targets if needed to clarify unit vs integration tiers
6. Follow Go conventions from CLAUDE.md

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)
```bash
make api-test-unit && make api-lint
```

## Completion
When done, commit all changes, push your branch, and report back with summary and quality gate results.

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773197331119-dftwf9x","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"cd /home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/worktree/quality-gates/api && for f in $(find . -name "*_test.go"); do
  # Check for functions that are empty or only have t.Skip
  if grep -Pzo "func (t \*testing\.T|func Test\w+\(t \*testing\.T\)[^}]*\n\s*(t\.Skip|}\s*$)" "$f" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "=== $f ==="
    grep -n "func Test" "$f"
  fi
done"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773197467801-zeor5bt","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"cd /home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/worktree/quality-gates/api && find internal -type d -name "*.go" -prune -o -type d -print | while read dir; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    test_count=$(find "$dir" -maxdepth 1 -name "*_test.go" | wc -l)
    if [ $test_count -eq 0 ]; then
      echo "NO TESTS: $dir"
    fi
  fi
done"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773197518523-kbnoph1","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"cd /home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/worktree/quality-gates/api && find cmd -type d | while read dir; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    test_count=$(find "$dir" -maxdepth 1 -name "*_test.go" | wc -l)
    src_count=$(find "$dir" -maxdepth 1 -name "*.go" ! -name "*_test.go" | wc -l)
    if [ $src_count -gt 0 ] && [ $test_count -eq 0 ]; then
      echo "NO TESTS (has $src_count .go files): $dir"
    fi
  fi
done"},"permission_updates":[]}}
